name: Financial Calculators
description: Free financial calculators for mortgages, loans, investments, retirement planning, taxes, and savings. Make smarter money decisions with accurate, easy-to-use tools.
metaDescription: Calculate mortgage payments, compound interest, loan terms, retirement savings, and more. Free financial calculators with no signup required.

subcategories.name: Mortgage & Home
subcategories.description: Calculate monthly mortgage payments, compare renting vs. buying, find your home budget, estimate refinance savings, and plan your down payment timeline.

subcategories.name: Loans & Debt
subcategories.description: Calculate monthly loan payments, find your implied interest rate, compare debt payoff strategies, and see total interest costs. Free loan calculators.

subcategories.name: Investment & Savings
subcategories.description: Project compound interest growth, calculate investment returns with contributions, track net worth, and measure the impact of inflation over time.

subcategories.name: Savings
subcategories.description: Calculate savings growth, CD returns, and savings goal timelines.

subcategories.name: Retirement
subcategories.description: Plan for retirement with 401k projections and savings calculators.

subcategories.name: Tax
subcategories.description: Estimate your 2025 federal income tax, see your tax bracket breakdown, calculate sales tax on any purchase, and convert salary to hourly pay. Free.
